name: GPI SpA
summary: GPI SpA provides ICT healthcare solutions for various public and private sector in Italy and internationally. Its products and services portfolio includes information systems and hi-tech platform for healthcare services, automated warehouse system for hospital and pharmacies, telemedicine and virtual care, DTM services, and e-payment solutions. It develops an EHR platform for diagnosis and treatment; clinical collaboration platform that enables clinicians to share patient information, such as reports, images, and structured data; IT solution for the management of various processes of neonatal intensive care unit, such as medical treatment, assistance, and information exchange between medical staff and parents; and a modular hospital information system to manage various clinical activities in private and public hospitals. The company also offers solutions for automated drug storage and picking system; a virtual care solution for patients', doctors, and healthcare operators; and Phebo, a platform for H2T evaluation of biometrics observations for tele-monitoring, virtual care, and telemedicine activities. The company was founded in 1988 and is based in Trento, Italy.
